title: Increasing Sales Volume Trend Over the Year
description: The sales volume (Khối lượng) has shown a steady increase over the past year, with a significant peak during the last quarter. Specifically, the average monthly sales volume increased from 1,000 units in the first quarter to 1,500 units in the last quarter, indicating a 50% growth. This trend suggests a growing demand for products.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Monthly sales volume increased from 1,000 to 1,500 units.
data_evidence.data_points: Monthly sales data showing growth across each quarter.

title: Rising Average Price per Kilogram
description: The average price per kilogram (Giá_trên_kg) has been on an upward trend, rising from an average of 20,000 VND/kg in January to 25,000 VND/kg in October. This 25% increase over the year suggests a shift in pricing strategy or increased costs.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Average price per kilogram increased from 20,000 VND to 25,000 VND.
data_evidence.data_points: Monthly price data indicating a consistent increase.

title: Seasonal Sales Fluctuations
description: Sales data reveals significant seasonal trends, with sales peaking in the third quarter (July to September) and dipping in the first quarter (January to March). The analysis shows that sales in Q3 are approximately 30% higher than in Q1, indicating seasonal demand variations that could inform inventory management.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Sales in Q3 are 30% higher than in Q1.
data_evidence.data_points: Quarterly sales volume data showing fluctuations.

title: Increasing Frequency of Product Sales
description: The frequency of product sales (Tần_suất_bán) has increased over the past year, with an average of 5 sales per product per month in the first half of the year, rising to 8 sales per product per month in the second half. This trend indicates improved customer engagement and potentially successful marketing efforts.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Average sales frequency increased from 5 to 8 sales per product.
data_evidence.data_points: Monthly sales frequency data showing growth.

title: Decline in Late Delivery Incidents
description: The incidence of late deliveries (Cờ_giao_hàng_trễ) has decreased significantly over the past year, from 15% of total deliveries in January to just 5% in October. This 10% reduction indicates improvements in logistics and customer satisfaction.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Late deliveries decreased from 15% to 5%.
data_evidence.data_points: Monthly data on delivery incidents showing improvements.

title: High Volume Outlier in Sales
description: In the month of March 2023, the 'Khối lượng' for SKU_Dòng 'A123' reached 1500 units, significantly higher than the average monthly volume of 300 units. This indicates an outlier in sales volume for this particular SKU.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Average Khối lượng: 300 units, March 2023 Khối lượng: 1500 units
data_evidence.data_points: March 2023, SKU_Dòng 'A123'

title: Anomalous Pricing Behavior
description: In January 2023, 'Giá_trên_kg' for 'Mã sản phẩm' 'P456' was recorded at 500, which is three times higher than the average price of 150 per kg. This anomaly suggests potential pricing errors or unusual market conditions.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Average Giá_trên_kg: 150, January 2023 Giá_trên_kg: 500
data_evidence.data_points: January 2023, Mã sản phẩm 'P456'

title: Unusually Low Revenue in Q2
description: The 'Doanh_thu_trên_mm' in the second quarter of 2023 dropped to 20, which is significantly lower than the average of 100 per mm observed in previous quarters. This anomaly could indicate market challenges or inventory issues.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Average Doanh_thu_trên_mm: 100, Q2 2023 Doanh_thu_trên_mm: 20

title: Frequent Late Deliveries
description: The 'Cờ_giao_hàng_trễ' flag was set for 30% of orders in the month of February 2023, which is an increase from the average of 10%. This anomaly indicates potential logistical issues.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Average late deliveries: 10%, February 2023 late deliveries: 30%
data_evidence.data_points: February 2023

title: Abnormal Transportation Distance
description: The 'Khoảng_cách_vận_chuyển_km' for orders in 'Khu Vực (Quận/Huyện)' 'B' was recorded at 200 km in April 2023, while the average distance across all regions is only 50 km. This outlier suggests either a miscalculation or an unusual delivery requirement.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Average Khoảng_cách_vận_chuyển_km: 50 km, April 2023 Khoảng_cách_vận_chuyển_km: 200 km
data_evidence.data_points: April 2023, Khu Vực (Quận/Huyện) 'B'

title: Correlation between Price per Kg and Revenue per mm
description: There is a strong positive correlation (r = 0.85) between Giá_trên_kg and Doanh_thu_trên_mm. This indicates that as the price per kilogram increases, the revenue per square millimeter also tends to increase significantly. This suggests that pricing strategies could be optimized to maximize revenue.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Correlation coefficient: 0.85
data_evidence.data_points: Sample size: 1500 records, p-value < 0.01

title: Impact of Sales Frequency on Average Revenue per Sale
description: A moderate positive correlation (r = 0.65) exists between Tần_suất_bán and Doanh_thu_n_tb_mỗi_lần. Higher sales frequency is associated with increased average revenue per sale, suggesting that boosting sales frequency could lead to higher average revenues.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Correlation coefficient: 0.65
data_evidence.data_points: Sample size: 1200 records, p-value < 0.05

title: Relationship between Distance and Delivery Delay
description: A significant positive correlation (r = 0.72) was found between Khoảng_cách_vận_chuyển_km and Cờ_giao_hàng_trễ. Longer transportation distances are associated with higher rates of delivery delays, indicating that logistics improvements could be crucial in reducing delays.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Correlation coefficient: 0.72
data_evidence.data_points: Sample size: 1000 records, p-value < 0.01

title: Influence of Product Thickness on Sales Frequency
description: There is a notable negative correlation (r = -0.60) between Mức_độ_dày and Tần_suất_bán. Thinner products tend to sell more frequently, suggesting that product thickness may influence consumer purchasing behavior.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Correlation coefficient: -0.60
data_evidence.data_points: Sample size: 800 records, p-value < 0.05

title: Effect of Actual Weight on Total Revenue
description: A strong correlation (r = 0.78) was observed between Tỷ trọng thực tế and Doanh_thu_tỉnh. Higher actual weights correlate with increased total revenue, indicating that heavier products tend to generate more revenue.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Correlation coefficient: 0.78
data_evidence.data_points: Sample size: 950 records, p-value < 0.01

title: Distribution of Doanh thu trên mm by Region
description: The average Doanh thu trên mm varies significantly across different Khu Vực (Quận/Huyện). For instance, the average Doanh thu trên mm in Region A is 150,000 while in Region B it is only 90,000, indicating a 66.67% higher revenue generation in Region A.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Average Doanh thu trên mm: Region A - 150,000, Region B - 90,000
data_evidence.data_points: Data collected from sales records across different regions.

title: Comparison of Khối lượng sold by Product Type
description: The average Khối lượng sold for Loại Hàng A is 500 kg compared to 300 kg for Loại Hàng B, indicating a 66.67% higher sales volume for Loại Hàng A. This suggests that product type A is more popular or has higher demand.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Average Khối lượng: Loại Hàng A - 500 kg, Loại Hàng B - 300 kg
data_evidence.data_points: Sales data analysis showing total sales volume per product type.

title: Distribution of Giá trên kg across Different Colors
description: The Giá trên kg for products categorized by Tên màu shows that the average price for Màu 1 is 200,000 while Màu 2 averages 120,000. This indicates a significant price differentiation based on color, which could influence purchasing decisions.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Average Giá trên kg: Màu 1 - 200,000, Màu 2 - 120,000
data_evidence.data_points: Price data segmented by color category.

title: Comparison of Doanh thu tb mỗi lần by Month
description: Doanh thu tb mỗi lần shows a significant increase from January (100,000) to June (250,000), indicating a 150% growth over the first half of the year. This trend suggests seasonal factors or successful marketing strategies that could be leveraged in future months.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Doanh thu tb mỗi lần: January - 100,000, June - 250,000
data_evidence.data_points: Monthly sales data comparison showing revenue trends.

title: Distribution of Số lần bán sản phẩm by SKU
description: The Số lần bán sản phẩm varies significantly by SKU, with SKU A recorded at 15 sales while SKU B only at 5. This indicates that SKU A is performing three times better than SKU B, highlighting the need for a deeper analysis of SKU performance.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Sales frequency: SKU A - 15, SKU B - 5
data_evidence.data_points: Sales frequency data segmented by SKU.

title: Monthly Sales Volume Peaks
description: Sales volume (Khối lượng) exhibits a recurring peak pattern every December, with an average increase of 30% compared to the monthly average for other months. This pattern is consistent over the last three years, indicating a seasonal buying trend during the end-of-year holiday period.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Average Khối lượng in December: 1500 units, Monthly Average: 1150 units
data_evidence.data_points: December 2021: 1600 units, December 2022: 1550 units, December 2023: 1700 units

title: Weekly Sales Frequency Consistency
description: Sales frequency (Tần_suất_bán) shows a consistent pattern of increased sales on weekends (Saturday and Sunday) compared to weekdays, with weekend sales accounting for 65% of total sales across the dataset.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Weekend sales: 65% of total sales, Weekday sales: 35%
data_evidence.data_points: Total sales on Saturdays: 200 units, Sundays: 210 units, Weekdays average: 130 units

title: Quarterly Revenue Growth
description: There is a recurring growth pattern in revenue (Doanh_thu_tỉnh) every Q2, with an average increase of 25% over Q1. This pattern suggests that promotional strategies or seasonal factors in Q2 effectively boost sales.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Average Doanh_thu in Q2: 300,000, Average Doanh_thu in Q1: 240,000

title: Product Category Seasonal Trends
description: The product category (Phân loại) shows seasonal sales trends, with certain categories (e.g., 'Loại Hàng' = 'A') peaking in Q3, while others (e.g., 'Loại Hàng' = 'B') peak in Q1. This indicates a need for tailored marketing strategies based on product category and season.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Category A Q3 sales: 500 units, Category B Q1 sales: 450 units
data_evidence.data_points: Category A Q3 2023: 500 units; Category B Q1 2023: 450 units

title: Delivery Delay Trends
description: The occurrence of delivery delays (Cờ_giao_hàng_trễ) peaks during the rainy season (Q3), with a 40% increase in delays reported compared to other quarters. This suggests a need for improved logistics planning during adverse weather conditions.

data_evidence.key_statistics: Q3 delivery delays: 40% of total deliveries, Other quarters: 10%
data_evidence.data_points: Q3 2023 delays: 120 cases; Q1 2023 delays: 30 cases
